leadText: A Pass Orb (Japanese: デルダマ Emerging Sphere) is a type of item introduced and used exclusively in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pass Orbs can be used to purchase Pass Powers at the Entralink .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods B W Entralink ( Entralink missions ), other players' worlds B2 W2 Entralink ( Funfest Missions ) DW * Dream Park , Icy Cave , Pleasant Forest , Rugged Mountain , Sparkling Sea , Spooky Manor , Windswept Sky

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A mysterious orb containing the power of the Unova region, to be used when generating Pass Power.
